shows.name: House of House
shows.desc: Join me as I explore the best of house music, from classic tracks to fresh new beats. Perfect for anyone who loves to dance or just needs a good groove to get through the day.

shows.name: Ent & Vent
shows.desc: This will just be me playing music that I like during the week. Normally the songs I listen to are a way to vent in ways I can't express otherwise. I'll probably introduce them and maybe say way I like them. Usually noise rock

shows.name: The Theatre Hour
shows.desc: Join WJTB for an hour of nonstop musicals! Listen to the latest albums, learn about the coolest theatre opportunities on campus, and discover new musicals to listen to!
